title: GAP MINISTRIES - 211info
text: LOVE INC NEWBERG GAP MINISTRIES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Connects people with local churches and service agencies. Basic goods and services are offered to clients as they are donated. Services available may include, but are not limited to: bicycles, breakfast/lunch bags, clothing closets (adults and children), community meals, counseling services, diapers, haircuts, H.U.G.S. (hats, umbrellas, gloves, scarves, and socks), kitchen supplies, laundry service, bedding/linens, personal grooming supplies/toiletries, over-the-counter medications, personal care kits, physical therapy, showers, water bill assistance, and firewood. Accepts donations of bedding and linen, clothing, and personal grooming supplies. 200 S College Street Newberg, OR 97132 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Thursday 10am-1pm Email (503) 537-3999 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (503) 537-3999 Main phone Main phone (503) 537-3999 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for appointment or more information. All services go through the Love INC Connection Center. After meeting with a specialist, the client will be issued vouchers to receive appropriate services from local partners. Assistance is determined on an individual basis and is not guaranteed. FEES: None DOCUMENTS: Photo ID, proof of address LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Cities of Carlton, Dayton, Dundee, Lafayette, Newberg, Saint Paul, and Yamhill Services: Bedding/Linen Bedding/Linen Donation Programs Children's Clothing Clothing Donation Programs Community Meals Diapers Faith Based Counseling General Clothing Provision Hair and Nail Care Heating Fuel Payment Assistance Kitchenware Laundry Vouchers Local Bicycle Transportation Personal/Grooming Supplies Personal/Grooming Supplies Donation Programs Public Showers/Baths School Supplies Donation Programs Water Service Payment Assistance Winter Clothing Other Services Offered At This Location: HOUSING/SHELTER - WOMEN'S TRANSITIONAL LIVING PROGRAM INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - TRANSFORMATIONAL MINISTRY If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. LOVE INC NEWBERG
